game_name: Déjà Vu: A Nightmare Comes True
extraction_notes: Wikipedia source provides composer information (Hiroyuki Masuno, Kento's Group for NES) and general reception noting music was 'average' per Digital Press review, but does not document specific tempo, keys, chord progressions, track names, areas, or SFX characteristics. Game is a point-and-click adventure set in 1940s Chicago with no gameplay mechanics that typically generate distinct SFX profiles (no jumping, combat, or item collection in traditional sense).
